reviews.review_title: Low effort isn't the word smh
reviews.review_description: This should be free .99 , updates won't save this , start over from scratch . As nothing added to this bare bone foundation will save it ... happy to Refund this

developer_response.body: I appreciate the feedback. I understand the project feels too bare-bones in its current state, and I’m sorry it didn’t meet your expectations. Thank you for giving it a try
